inputs.label: Total Railing Length
inputs.businessContext: Total linear length of railing including posts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total linear length of railing including posts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Direkler dahil korkuluğun toplam doğrusal uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur linéaire totale de la rambarde, poteaux compris.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud lineal total de la barandilla, incluidos los postes.

inputs.label: Number of Posts
inputs.businessContext: Total number of posts in the railing run (minimum 2 for ends).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of posts in the railing run (minimum 2 for ends).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Korkuluk hattındaki toplam direk sayısı (uçlar için minimum 2).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Pfosten im Geländerverlauf (mindestens 2 für die Enden).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de poteaux dans la rampe (minimum 2 pour les extrémités).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de postes en el tramo de barandilla (mínimo 2 para los extremos).

inputs.label: Maximum Allowed Gap
inputs.businessContext: Maximum gap between balusters as per safety code (commonly 4 inches = 0.1016 m).

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum gap between balusters as per safety code (commonly 4 inches = 0.1016 m).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güvenlik yönetmeliğine göre korkuluklar arasındaki maksimum boşluk (genellikle 4 inç = 0.1016 m).
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximaler Abstand zwischen Streben gemäß Sicherheitsvorschrift (üblich 4 Zoll = 0,1016 m).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart maximal entre les balustres selon le code de sécurité (généralement 4 pouces = 0,1016 m).
businessContext_i18n.es: Espacio máximo entre balaustres según el código de seguridad (comúnmente 4 pulgadas = 0.1016 m).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
